title: Maycarios's Higher Build Limit
body:
Maycarios Higher Build Limit

ABOUT

As the name suggests, Maycarios's Higher Build Limit is a datapack that makes the Build Limit in Minecraft even higher. Now this datapack has three versions: Version 512, 1024, and 2032. You can choose based on your preferences.

NOTE

I have tested whether this datapack can be installed in the World that I have created before, and the answer I got is.. yes, of course you can. However, I do not recommend you to install this datapack in the world that you have created. If you insist on installing this datapack on your already created world, you should prepare a backup of your world so you can avoid world corruption. If there is a bug please let me know, I will try to fix it if I can.
Anyway, Thankyou for downloading! Have fun! <3

INSTALLATION

Download Maycarios's Higher Build Limit.zip datapack; put the datapack .zip file into the datapack folder of your Minecraft world saves or drag the zip file upon the world creation to datapack page.

Check the Planet Minecraft page too!
